commands.narrative:
## Roster Changes Since Yesterday

No roster changes between yesterday's snapshot (2026-05-29) and today. Note: `v25-bot-excl-climbing-live-micro` was already absent from yesterday's snapshot — it was removed prior to the 05-29 run, making action items ai-2026-05-29-002 and ai-2026-05-27-007 (both targeting that strategy) now EXECUTED.

## Headline

Bot is HEALTHY with 9 strategies at composite score 100 — the bot-excl-climbing family dominates. The single most urgent operator action is executing the pending kill slate (v10, v14, v35 cluster) which has sat PROPOSED for 3+ days.

## What's Accumulating SOL

The bot-excl-climbing family is the clear edge engine this cycle. All four exit-configuration variants of v25-bot-excl-climbing hit score=100 with edge_flag=STRENGTHENING:

| Strategy | n | drop_top3 | total | monthly |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| v34-bot-excl-climbing-minlift | 242 | +2.738 | +6.105 | +21.02 SOL/mo |
| v28-bot-excl-climbing-1s-ttp | 280 | +3.809 | +7.175 | +20.17 SOL/mo |
| v32-bot-excl-climbing-1s | 238 | +3.505 | +5.818 | +20.03 SOL/mo |
| v33-bot-excl-climbing-ttp5 | 240 | +3.083 | +5.743 | +19.77 SOL/mo |
| v25-bot-excl-climbing (parent) | 418 | +6.453 | +8.766 | +16.57 SOL/mo |

The drop_top3 figures are all comfortably positive — this is not a lottery-ticket outcome. v25 parent has the largest n (418) and the most conservative monthly rate, while v34 (trailingTP 10% + minLift 20pp) produces the highest run rate. Five v39 entry-gate variants also clear all four gates (monthly 16–17.6 SOL/mo, n=115–128, drop_top3=+2.0 to +2.3 SOL). The whole family is backed by v44 live-micro already earning +0.15 SOL on the same underlying signal.

The v40-acc-gate strategy (n=69, drop3=+3.163 SOL, monthly=+20.48 SOL/mo, score=95.2) is the most promising watch — if it can reach n=100 it may outperform all current promotables on monthly run rate. The v41-holders-15..19 cluster and v42-breakeven-20 are also pacing well at n=74-76.

## What's Bleeding

The kill slate continues to drag portfolio net SOL with zero action over 3 days:

| Strategy | n | drop_top3 | total | verdict |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| v35-vel2050-holders10 | 138 | -5.904 | -3.383 | HIT-KILL in journal |
| v35-vel2050-top10-40 | 135 | -4.717 | -2.196 | INVALID, proposed 05-27 |
| v35-vel2050-top10-25-gini | 103 | -4.043 | -1.701 | INVALID, not yet proposed |
| v14-sumabs-shadow | 121 | -2.156 | -0.485 | INVALID, proposed 05-27 |
| v10-best-double | 163 | -1.954 | +0.585 | drop_top3 fails, DECAYING, proposed 05-27 |

All five clear n≥100. v35-holders10 and v35-top10-40 are both INVALID on all gates. v35-top10-25-gini is new to the kill list today (n crossed 100 with drop3=-4.043). The v28-best-double-1s-ttp mirror of v10 is also flagged DECAYING (n=64, not yet killable by hard gate but watch carefully).

## Live Trading Observation

The two live-micro strategies (v44-climb-live-micro, v44-climb-1s-ttp10-live-micro) are running at 0.05 SOL position size and earning +0.147 and +0.144 SOL respectively (OPEN journal). Today shows 3 live sell failures with retry escalation — the circuit breaker is not tripped and this pattern has appeared in recent days. Worth monitoring whether sell failures are increasing, but no immediate intervention needed.

## Cross-Day Patterns

The promote recommendations for v25, v28, v32, v33 have been PROPOSED since 05-27 with no operator action for 3 consecutive days. The bot-excl-climbing signal is STRENGTHENING, not decaying — there is no data reason to wait. The 39 strict_filter anomalies (V29-V31 macro-regime gating series) are expected behavior and not actionable.

## Outlier Check

All nine promotable strategies pass the drop_top3 > 0 test. The top-3 contribution ranges from ~26% (v25-parent: 6.453/8.766) to ~45% (v39 variants). These are fat-tail memecoin distributions as expected — the edge is real after outlier strip.

## Single Most Important Operator Action

Execute the kill slate for v10-best-double, v14-sumabs-shadow, v35-vel2050-holders10, v35-vel2050-top10-40, and v35-vel2050-top10-25-gini via strategy-commands.json (5 deletes). This removes approximately -7.5 SOL of lifetime losses from the active roster and stops ongoing bleeding. Then recommend promoting v28-bot-excl-climbing-1s-ttp or v34-bot-excl-climbing-minlift to live as the first non-micro full position.

action_items.summary: Promote v34-bot-excl-climbing-minlift to live — score=100, n=242, drop_top3=+2.738 SOL, monthly=+21.02 SOL/mo (highest run rate of all promotables). All 4 gates clear, edge STRENGTHENING.
Kill v35-vel2050-top10-25-gini — n=103, drop_top3=-4.043 SOL, total=-1.701 SOL, monthly=-7.14 SOL/mo. INVALID on all 4 gates. Not in prior kill proposals.
Promote v39-entry-n50-100 to live — score=100, n=128, drop_top3=+2.337 SOL, monthly=+17.60 SOL/mo. Entry gate [-50,+100] variant. All 4 gates clear.
